title: Admin's Domain
description: Explore a world beyond the three dimensions in to a dangerous dimension to defeat the Admin of the world. Inspired and based on Minecraft Story Mode
body:
Is getting base minecraft gear too easy? Do you want special, more powerful weapons? Mabye you want to fight more bosses other than the Ender Dragon, Warden, or the Wither? This mod has what you need.

 

The Admin's Domain is a mod that adds an extra dimension after you defeat the Ender Dragon.

 

To begin progression, you must enter the end to unlock its recipe. Once you unlock this, you can craft the Admin Void Teleporter and begin your journey through the admin void, a place never meant to be seen by anyone.

Within the Admin Void, you can find bosses located at their spawners.

Here are the bosses:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Great Enderman - Craftable boss with enderite ores located in the Enderlands

Three Headed Ghast - Spawnable boss located in the Banlands

Centauratus - Spawnable boss located in the Centauria Forest

Elytela - "Natural" boss located in the Redstone Canyons

</details>

After beating all four bosses, you can craft a special item to allow yourself to battle the admin himself. Good luck :)

Note: This mod was built to be difficult. Bring enchanted netherrite gear to give yourself a fighting chance.
